title: coleus helferi
intro: Coleus helferi, also known as Painted Nettle or Jungle Nettle, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Coleus helferi include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Coleus helferi is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
